templates.instant: Hi {name}, this is {owner_name} from {business_name}. Got your request about {service}. When is a good time to connect today?
templates.followup_2h: Hey {name}, just following up on your {service} request. Still looking for help?
templates.followup_24h: Hi {name}, checking in. Ready to move forward? Reply here and I will call you today.
templates.followup_72h: Hi {name}, this is my last follow-up. Ready to move forward? If not, no worries.
templates.missed_call: Sorry I missed your call, I'm on a job site right now. What do you need help with? Text me here and I will call you back within the hour. -{owner_name}
